content: Moon info officially generates per-package/per-target mbti public interface files with no-alias available, but reviewed official docs do not define byte stability or a semantic diff classifier. Raw text diffs can flag ordering, aliases, formatting, target differences, or toolchain drift, while interface-only comparison can miss documented behavior, trait coherence, representation, and resource-contract changes. Normalize under a pinned toolchain, classify only known deltas, and require behavioral consumers plus manual policy review for unknown changes.
